r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: You suffer from embarrassing, disruptive digestive problems that affect your daily life, social activities, and overall health - and you need natural solutions without expensive drugs or painful surgery
emotional_amplifiers: Ever have that feeling? Like your bowels are going to explode?
Don't get too far from a restroom
Just feel so [uncomfortable] you can't enjoy yourself
One of the leading causes of employee absenteeism
relatability_triggers: 10 to 20 percent of general population affected by IBS
Leading cause of employee absenteeism in United States
Some of your friends are having the same problems
Privacy of your own home to get answers

s_specific_solution.core_mechanism: Natural food-based solutions and simple lifestyle changes that solve digestive problems from the inside out - straight from your own kitchen pantry - without dangerous drugs or expensive procedures
mechanism_proof_points: Information even your doctor may not have heard
unique_differentiators: Good old-fashioned remedies straight from your pantry
Solutions right in your own kitchen
May have exactly what you need this very minute
Natural solutions vs. dangerous drugs or expensive procedures

tactical_breakdown.mechanism: Make simple changes to eliminate air swallowing
Fruits that fix naturally, tablespoon of mystery food daily
Drop pounds with good fats, sleep on specific side, avoid certain foods
tactical_breakdown.benefit: Turn down the heat of heartburn

tactical_breakdown.mechanism: Effective ways to ease stress and calm digestion

f_freedom_promise.primary_transformation: Take control of your health, enhance your daily life, face life with confidence, and enjoy activities again - free from digestive disruption and embarrassment

promises: No constant worry about bathroom access

Plain Answers about IBS, Constipation, Diarrhea, Heartburn, Ulcers, and More

headline.personal_note_headline: From the desk of Charlotte Garner: If you suffer from bloating, abdominal cramps, constipation, diarrhea, digestive spasms, or irritable bowel syndrome, I've got VERY good news for you.

lead.opening_hook: Relatable visceral sensation ('Foods that EXPLODE in your bowel') + 'Ever have that feeling?' + visual description of problem
credibility_ladder: FC&A Medical Publishing (over 45 years in business)
problem_agitation: Foods aren't completely absorbed until they reach colon
Your digestive system feels like it's going to explode
Embarrassing problems affecting work and social life
lead.solution_reveal: Natural solutions straight from your kitchen pantry - honey, peppermint, bananas, simple foods and lifestyle changes - all in one complete guidebook you can try FREE for 21 days

testimonial_proof.name: Lynn C., Roseburg, OR
testimonial_proof.result: Learned so many helpful things - drinking from small-mouth bottle/straw causes air swallowing, teas and spices stop gas, etc.
testimonial_proof.quote: I have IBS and my biggest problem was bloating. I've learned so many helpful things from this book.

testimonial_proof.name: William A., Las Vegas, NV
testimonial_proof.problem: Constipation, IBS, hard stools, 'forcing the issue'
testimonial_proof.result: After 30 days, problems are history at age 84
testimonial_proof.quote: I tried your suggestions for thirty days; and lo and behold, I can finally say that these problems are history. I have been able to 'live again' at age 84. I simply can't thank you enough.

testimonial_proof.name: Kathleen D., Nixa, OR
testimonial_proof.problem: Running to doctor with every ache or pain, needed to be proactive
testimonial_proof.result: In-depth explanations of procedures, protocols, common sense approaches
testimonial_proof.quote: The Complete Guide to Digestive Health shows me how to be proactive with my diet and screenings. The in-depth explanations... have been a real blessing.

testimonial_proof.name: Monica M., Hadley, PA
testimonial_proof.problem: 84 years old, suffered from diarrhea and gas, afraid to go places
testimonial_proof.result: Learned right foods to eat and exercises to do, no more diarrhea pills
testimonial_proof.quote: I was afraid to go anyplace. In your book, I learned the right foods to eat, and the exercises to do. Now I am doing so much better. No more diarrhea pills.

testimonial_proof.name: Juanita C., Lompoc, CA
testimonial_proof.problem: Reflux for years, no one told her it was dangerous or what caused it, couldn't swallow anything (not even water), didn't want to go to ER
testimonial_proof.result: Found GERD in book - first time heard of it, told everything including why difficulty in choir, took book to doctor, now on proper medication and diet
testimonial_proof.quote: I had reflux for years and no one ever told me it was dangerous or what caused it. Then one day, I found that I could not swallow ANYTHING, not even water!... I thought of your book and found GERD - the first I had ever heard of it. It told me everything... I took the book to my doctor. I am now on proper medication and diet. Thank God for that information.

authority_proof: FC&A Medical Publishing - over 45 years in business
Gayle K. Wood - established health author
Specific page numbers for every claim

metadata.title: The Complete Guidebook To Digestive Health

metadata.product: The Complete Guide to Digestive Health book (563+ pages)
metadata.author: Gayle K. Wood
metadata.hook_type: Foods That Explode + Common Problem Solution

objection_complexity.objection: Medical information is too complex for me
objection_complexity.response: Plain answers about IBS, constipation, diarrhea, heartburn, ulcers, and more. In-depth explanations of procedures, protocols. Easy-to-understand format. Privacy of your own home.

objection_cost.response: Solutions right in your own kitchen. May have what you need this very minute. Two-cent colon cleanser (page 303). Inexpensive remedies throughout. Just four easy payments for complete book.

objection_risk.objection: What if it doesn't work for me?
objection_risk.response: 21-day FREE preview. Read it, use it, then decide. If doesn't meet expectations, write 'no thanks' on invoice and return with book - owe nothing. PLUS FC&A's no-time-limit guarantee: return for full refund if ever become dissatisfied.

objection_availability.objection: Where can I find these solutions?
objection_availability.response: Straight from your pantry. Honey, peppermint, bananas, cinnamon, garlic, oregano - common foods you already know. Simple changes you can make immediately.

objection_embarrassment.objection: These problems are too embarrassing to discuss
objection_embarrassment.response: In the privacy of your own home, you can get answers to all those embarrassing questions. You're not alone - 10-20% of population affected. Chances are some friends have same problems.

objection_doctor.objection: Should I check with my doctor?
objection_doctor.response: Take book to your doctor (testimonial shows doctor appreciated information, put patient on proper treatment). Shows procedures and protocols doctors use. Helps you be informed patient.

objection_urgency.response: Free Gift Offer Guarantee expires on date printed on Preview Certificate. Act today to receive free booklet 'Eat to Beat the Top 27 Health Problems.' Mail card before expiration date.
